title: Traditional March Strategy
content: The primary land attack method used during wars. Usually used in coordinated waves to gain acres and weaken enemy provinces.

title: Ambush Strategy
content: A defensive response to enemy land attacks. Used to recover lost land and punish attackers when conditions allow.

title: Raze Strategy
content: An attack used to destroy enemy buildings and reduce province value instead of gaining land.

title: Massacre Strategy
content: An attack focused on killing enemy population and reducing province strength. Often used against difficult targets.

title: Plunder Strategy
content: An attack focused on stealing resources from an enemy province.

title: Learn Strategy
content: An attack focused on gaining science knowledge from an enemy province.

title: Wave
content: A coordinated series of attacks performed by multiple kingdom members against selected targets at the same time.

title: Chain
content: A coordinated attack plan where multiple hits reduce a target province through acres, population, and military losses.

title: Target Selection
content: Choosing enemy targets based on intel such as networth, defense, offense, race, and role.

title: Hostile Meter
content: A measure of kingdom relations that increases through hostile actions and affects available interactions.

title: Unfriendly
content: A kingdom relation state indicating rising conflict and access to additional hostile actions.

title: Hostile
content: A kingdom relation state showing active conflict and enabling war-related actions.
